allies.rationale_text: Base-rates help statistical-discipline anchor analysis to the outside view before the inside story takes over.
allies.source_quote: Outside View or Reference Class Forecasting

allies.rationale_text: Falsifiability keeps statistical-discipline hypothesis-led by forcing the analysis to expose what would disconfirm the current model.
Decision-trees help statistical-discipline choose the right analytical path before any heavy modeling begins.
allies.source_quote: decision tree that starts with defining the problem's nature

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines statistical-discipline by using evidence to defend a preferred story instead of testing it.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistical-discipline conflicts with narratives when statistical rigor rejects anecdotal evidence that carries genuine causal signal not yet captured in quantitative data.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistical-discipline conflicts with narratives (narratives) when statistical rigor rejects anecdotal evidence that carries genuine causal signal not yet captured in quantitative data.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistical-discipline conflicts with simplification when statistical nuance is compressed into summary metrics that lose the distributional information needed for sound inference.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistical-discipline conflicts with simplification (simplification) when statistical nuance is compressed into summary metrics that lose the distributional information needed for sound inference.
